title: Subitems and main tasks should be able to do the same things
excerpt:

posts.author: Hattie (Harriet L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - why are subitems considered less important than main tasks?
Literally everything that I try to do with main tasks I would also want to do with subtasks. Mirroring into other boards, seeing total time tracking on main and sub items. You have to set up columns separately to the main task and the fact they’re not connected just doesn’t make any sense that there isn’t an option to connect them. There are so many requests that are so specific to subitems because they can’t do the same thing as main items.
